# testRuns

**Instance Property**

An array of test runs that the test suite manages.

## Declaration

```swift
var testRuns: [XCTestRun] { get }
```

## Managing Test Runs

- **addTestRun(_:)**: Adds a test run to the test suite.

items.description: Adds a test run to the test suite.
